name: Fiesta Shrimp Dip
recipeIngredient: Or 10 Ounces Frozen, Cooked, Shelled, Thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop shrimp, reserving a few whole shrimp for garnish.
2. Combine chopped shrimp with remaining ingredients except green onions; mix well.
3. Spoon mixture into serving bowl and garnish with green onion and reserved shrimp.
4. Chill.
5. Serve with assorted crackers, chips or vegetable dippers.
6. Makes about 2-1/2 cups dip.
Note: If frozen shrimp are used in place of canned, add 1/4 teaspoon salt before chilling.
